name: Arva AI
description: Arva AI offers AI-powered compliance and business-verification services for banks and fintech firms.
whyNeedVoiceAI: Arva AI's services involve complex compliance processes that could benefit from AI voice agents to handle routine inquiries, provide real-time assistance, and ensure consistent communication, thereby improving scalability and reducing operational costs.
recentNews: In January 2025, Arva AI raised a $3 million seed funding round led by Gradient Ventures.

name: Sierra AI
description: Sierra AI develops autonomous AI agents and conversational AI technologies designed to automate customer service and support interactions for business clients.
whyNeedVoiceAI: As a company specializing in AI-driven customer service solutions, Sierra AI could enhance its offerings by integrating advanced AI voice agents to provide seamless, 24/7 support, addressing scalability issues and improving customer satisfaction.
recentNews: In September 2025, Sierra AI was nearing a $350 million financing round, valuing the company at $10 billion.

name: Active.Ai
description: Active.Ai focuses on artificial intelligence, using natural language processing and machine intelligence to allow banks to interact with customers via messaging and voice.
whyNeedVoiceAI: Active.Ai's services are centered around AI-driven customer interactions; integrating advanced AI voice agents could further enhance their offerings, providing scalable and cost-effective customer support solutions.
recentNews: In November 2016, Active.Ai raised $3 million from ID Ventures India and Kalaari Capital.

name: Yellow.ai
description: Yellow.ai provides an AI platform for automating customer support experiences across chat and voice, supporting more than 135 languages across more than 35 channels.
whyNeedVoiceAI: As a company specializing in customer service automation, Yellow.ai could further enhance its platform by integrating advanced AI voice agents, addressing scalability issues, and improving customer satisfaction.
recentNews: In August 2021, Yellow.ai raised $78.15 million in a Series C funding round led by WestBridge Capital, Sapphire Ventures, Salesforce Ventures, and Lightspeed Venture Partners.

name: NL-Pearl
description: NL-Pearl specializes in conversational AI for voice-based customer interactions, applying natural language processing and machine learning to automate voice communications traditionally handled by human contact center agents.
whyNeedVoiceAI: As a company specializing in AI-driven voice interactions, NL-Pearl could benefit from integrating advanced AI voice agents to enhance their offerings, providing scalable and cost-effective customer support solutions.
recentNews: In 2024, NL-Pearl was selected as a finalist for the 'T-Challenge,' a global competition hosted by T-Mobile and Deutsche Telekom focused on the use of AI in telecommunications.

name: Quiq
description: Quiq provides an enterprise customer-experience platform using agentic AI, integrating with CRM systems to support digital customer interactions.
whyNeedVoiceAI: Quiq's platform could benefit from AI voice agents to enhance customer engagement, reduce contact-center costs, and support revenue growth by providing efficient, scalable, and cost-effective customer support solutions.
